title: Runbook scratch evidence workflow checklist
problem: After tickets 068–075, scratch persist, summary, and evidence review CLIs exist but the runbook scatters steps across sections without a single numbered operator checklist.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook adds a numbered checklist: live probe → persist reviewed report → scratch summary → evidence review → operator loop plan.
Each step links to existing CLI commands; no new commands.
non_goals: No public export or site changes.
